_README: TEMPLATE — committed to repo to document schema. Real values live in known_customers.json (gitignored). DO NOT put real customer data in this template file.

<normalized-company-name>.stage: saturated | mature-small | mid | first-year | early | very-early

_stage_meanings.mature-small: small org near saturation. Potential ≈ current × 1.0-1.5
_stage_meanings.early: just starting; multi-x upside. Potential ≈ current × 3-15
_stage_meanings.very-early: barely scratched. NO upper cap from current — Claude reasons from company scale, current is floor only.

_normalization_notes: Keys must match storage._normalize_company_name output. Lowercase, no Inc/Corp/Systems suffix, no parentheticals, no division suffixes (cloud/platform/software/etc.).

example-company-do-not-use.note: Replace with real customer data in known_customers.json (gitignored).
